test_name: 2x B200 Post Load Ghost Power Persistence

evidence_chain.significance: Ghost power floor maintained throughout 9 minute 33 second post load observation
CRITICAL - Spontaneous 195W burst at 0% util with no workload. Autonomous GPU activity.
Periodic 30 second spikes continue from Test 04 pattern
Ghost power floor virtually identical to cold boot baseline confirming permanent state

observation_1.detail: GPU 0 jumped to 195.72W GPU 1 to 181.95W at 20:30:08 with zero workload running. SM clock activated to 1965 MHz. Utilization still 0%. Most severe finding in all B200 tests.

observation_2.detail: 143-146W maintained throughout entire post load observation. No recovery to lower state.

observation_3.detail: 30 second spike pattern from Test 04 continues unchanged in Test 05

observation_4.detail: Post load baseline 144.10W vs cold boot baseline 143.47W — difference only 0.63W confirming ghost power is permanent architectural state

screenshot_evidence.description: Raw nvidia-smi terminal output captured in RunPod web terminal
